member.summary: Provides configuration options for Dreamine WPF threading registration.

member.summary: Gets or sets whether Windows-specific threading services are registered.

member.summary: Gets or sets whether adaptive CPU cycle policy is used.

member.summary: Gets or sets whether the WPF thread monitor ViewModel is registered.

member.summary: Gets or sets whether existing registrations can be overwritten.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.Registration.DreamineThreadingWpfRegistration
member.summary: Provides registration helpers for Dreamine WPF threading services.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.Registration.DreamineThreadingWpfRegistration.Register(System.Action{Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.Options.DreamineThreadingWpfOptions})
member.summary: Registers Dreamine threading services for WPF applications.
member.param: The optional WPF threading configuration action.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.Services.BatchedDispatcher`1
member.summary: Coalesces high-frequency UI updates into batches dispatched on the WPF UI thread.
member.remarks: Producers call from any thread. The dispatcher schedules at most one pending at a time; all items queued in between are drained in one callback. A single batch is capped at items so the UI thread is not blocked too long even under bursty input — overflow is processed in the next pass. This is an internal mirror of the same component in Dreamine.Logging.Wpf to keep this package free of an inter-WPF-package dependency.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.Services.BatchedDispatcher`1.MaxBatchSize
member.summary: Maximum number of items processed in a single UI-thread batch.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.Services.BatchedDispatcher`1.#ctor(System.Windows.Threading.Dispatcher,System.Action{System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{`0}},System.Windows.Threading.DispatcherPriority)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Callback invoked on the UI thread with the drained batch.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.Services.BatchedDispatcher`1.Enqueue(`0)
member.summary: Enqueues an item for batched UI delivery.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.Services.IThreadUiDispatcher
member.summary: Abstracts UI thread dispatching for threading monitor view models.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.Services.IThreadUiDispatcher.Dispatcher
member.summary: Gets the underlying dispatcher used by batched UI updates.

member.summary: Executes the specified action on the UI thread.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.Services.IThreadUiDispatcher.BeginInvoke(System.Action)
member.summary: Executes the specified action asynchronously on the UI thread.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.Services.WpfThreadUiDispatcher.Dispatcher
member.summary: Gets the underlying WPF .

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.Services.WpfThreadUiDispatcher.Invoke(System.Action)
member.summary: Executes the specified action on the UI thread.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.Services.WpfThreadUiDispatcher.BeginInvoke(System.Action)
member.summary: Executes the specified action asynchronously on the UI thread at priority.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.DreamineThreadMonitorViewModel
member.summary: Provides the ViewModel for the Dreamine thread monitor view.
member.remarks: Polls the thread manager periodically and applies a diff-based update to : existing rows are mutated in place (only changed fields raise ), new threads are appended, and removed threads are deleted. This avoids the flicker and selection loss caused by a full Clear() + Add() refresh on every tick. UI updates are coalesced through at so the dispatcher queue cannot accumulate pending operations.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.DreamineThreadMonitorViewModel.DefaultRefreshInterval
member.summary: Default refresh interval for the polling timer.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.DreamineThreadMonitorViewModel.Threads
member.summary: Gets the thread information collection.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.DreamineThreadMonitorViewModel.StartCommand
member.summary: Gets the start selected thread command.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.DreamineThreadMonitorViewModel.StopCommand
member.summary: Gets the stop selected thread command.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.DreamineThreadMonitorViewModel.PauseCommand
member.summary: Gets the pause selected thread command.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.DreamineThreadMonitorViewModel.ResumeCommand
member.summary: Gets the resume selected thread command.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.DreamineThreadMonitorViewModel.RefreshCommand

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.DreamineThreadMonitorViewModel.#ctor(Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadManager,Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.Services.IThreadUiDispatcher,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.DreamineThreadMonitorViewModel.Refresh
member.summary: Forces an immediate refresh of the thread monitor data.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.ThreadInfoRow
member.summary: Mutable, observable wrapper around snapshots used by .
member.remarks: is an immutable snapshot, so binding the raw type to a DataGrid requires replacing the row object on every refresh, which causes selection flicker and forced row re-render. This wrapper is a stable per-thread row that raises only for fields that actually changed, so the grid keeps its row containers and selection across refreshes.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.ThreadInfoRow.Name
member.summary: Gets the worker thread name. Stable identifier; never changes after construction.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.ThreadInfoRow.Status
member.summary: Gets the worker thread status.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.ThreadInfoRow.Priority
member.summary: Gets the worker thread priority.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.ThreadInfoRow.IntervalMs
member.summary: Gets the worker thread interval in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.ThreadInfoRow.CoreIndex
member.summary: Gets the assigned CPU core index.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.ThreadInfoRow.UseAffinity
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether CPU affinity is enabled.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.ThreadInfoRow.JobCount
member.summary: Gets the number of jobs assigned to the worker.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.ThreadInfoRow.CycleCount
member.summary: Gets the number of completed cycles.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.ThreadInfoRow.StartedAt
member.summary: Gets the last started time.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.ThreadInfoRow.StoppedAt
member.summary: Gets the last stopped time.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.ThreadInfoRow.LastErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets the last exception message.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.ThreadInfoRow.IsRunning
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the worker is currently running. Convenience flag for binding (e.g. button enable state).

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.ThreadInfoRow.IsPaused
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the worker is currently paused.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.ThreadInfoRow.IsFaulted
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the worker is in a faulted state.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.ThreadInfoRow.#ctor(Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadInfo)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of from a snapshot.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Wpf.ViewModels.ThreadInfoRow.UpdateFrom(Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadInfo)
member.summary: Updates the row from a new snapshot, raising only for fields whose values changed.
